params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

params.SpellDescription: Add {C} for each charge counter on CARDNAME. Spend this mana only on costs that contain {X}.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add {C} for each charge counter on CARDNAME. Spend this mana only on costs that contain {X}.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a spell with {X} in its mana cost, put two charge counters on CARDNAME.
